files.patch:
@@ -25,7 +25,7 @@ jobs:
           version: 10.26.2
 
       - name: Use Node.js ${{ matrix.node-version }}
-        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v6
         with:
           node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}
           cache: "pnpm"
@@ -59,7 +59,7 @@ jobs:

         with:
           node-version: 20.x
           cache: "pnpm"

@@ -20,7 +20,7 @@ jobs:
